title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Saumitra Babu's ghost prevents Tiwari and Vibhuti from defecating. Meanwhile, Saxena informs others about the presence of Saumitra Babu's spirit.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Saxena conjures Saumitra's spirit, which vows to prevent Tiwari and Vibhuti from relieving themselves. Later, the spirit departs after dirt is thrown at the two men.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti sits down to eat the bhindi from the tiffin when Saxena comes out for a stroll. Meanwhile, Manmohan tells Anita that he is angry with the vegetable vendor.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: When Manmohan sees Anita and Angoori, he quickly pulls Anita away, yelling that Angoori is a snake person. But, Angoori immediately corrects him, saying she is not.

subTitle: A supernatural entity travelling through electricity disrupts Sunil and Minni's peaceful marriage. Furthermore, it possesses Minni's mother, demanding their compliance.

subTitle: Anita and Ammaji thrash the person who they think is Jagmohan. Later, Tiwari reveals his disguise for revenge and gets pummeled by Ammaji.

subTitle: Lord Krishna, once a naughty little child, grows up and embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: A man hired by Tiwari to kidnap Angoori accidentally takes Anita instead. Later, he abducts Anita a second time and demands that Vibhuti trade Angoori for her release.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: A man hired by Tiwari to kidnap Angoori accidentally takes Anita instead. Later, he abducts Anita a second time and demands that Vibhuti trade Angoori for her release.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Angoori gets disappointed when Tiwari refuses to give her money for shopping. Later, Bhoore gives Angoori a cheque for INR 50 lakh in exchange for a promise.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Tiwari and Vibhuti ridicule Angoori, but she soon changes her behaviour on Saxena's advice. Later, she insults Vibhuti and leaves Tiwari annoyed by refusing to prepare his breakfast.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Angoori constantly berates Tiwari and Vibhuti at her kitty party. Later, an inebriated Tiwari gives a detailed account of the incident to Ammaji.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Everyone at Angoori's party is shocked to see Ammaji's complete makeover. Later, Tiwari reprimands Bhoore, and Anita and Angoori pretend to be tipsy.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti decides to take Anita's advice and begins to look for a job. In the meantime, a client cancels a deal with Tiwari.

subTitle: Tiwari decides to inform Anita about Vibhuti becoming a beggar. Later, Vibhuti urges Angoori to join him in begging and offers to teach her.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Vibhuti assigns Teeka the task of picking up his aunt, Bulbul, from the station. Later, when Bulbul arrives, she showers Teeka with praise, delighting him.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Anita and Bulbul get into a heated dispute. Meanwhile, Teeka confesses his feelings for Bulbul to Angoori, who decides to play matchmaker and arrange a marriage between Teeka and Bulbul.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Tiwari's request for Bulbul's hand in marriage for Teeka is met with a violent response from Vibhuti. However, Bulbul reveals to Vibhuti that she has developed romantic feelings for Teeka.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
subTitle: Teeka attempts to take his own life after being humiliated by Vibhuti. Meanwhile, Tiwari threatens to have Vibhuti arrested following the failed marriage alliance with Bulbul.

subTitle: Vibhuti suffers a head injury and loses his memory after a freak accident involving Angoori. He refuses to recognise anyone, leaving Anita and Tiwari to deal with the chaotic consequences.
